not_touched_but_depended_on: agents/ingestion/rawdoc.py (existing RawDocument type, reused unchanged as common record shape)
agents/ingestion/dispatch.py (transitively invoked via the loaders' lazy imports)
downstream_consumers: Future subtasks under milestone #7 (Phase 5 benchmark suite): the three retrieval-arm benchmark harnesses (HiveMind, vector-RAG baseline, GraphRAG-style baseline) will all call agents/eval/datasets.py's load_dataset()/available_datasets() to get an identical corpus feed, per docs/LLD/eval.md's 'only the retrieval step varies between arms' requirement.

A later subtask will register the synthetic-PDF dataset loader (issue #26's third dataset) into the same registry; interface shape (load_dataset(name, *, limit=None) -> Iterator[RawDocument]) is designed to accept that without a breaking change.
risk_notes: agents/eval/ and data/ are separate Python roots (data/ has no __init__.py, relies on implicit namespace packages); wiring must replicate the exact sys.path pattern already established and verified in agents/ingestion/test_e2e_smoke.py (task-3.5.2) rather than invent a new mechanism, to stay consistent with the rest of the codebase.

Must not modify data/load_bitext.py, data/load_enron.py, or agents/ingestion/rawdoc.py -- this subtask is purely additive wiring, per the launcher's explicit instruction not to reimplement already-existing loading logic.
No engine/ (Go) changes; no new third-party dependencies.
